productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Ralston Mid Lite Black Casual Shoes
description: Cut a dash with these shoes for the cosmopolitan male from nike. Inspired by the rugged Texas plains and the cowboy lifestyle from a bygone era, these shoes pay homage to the Wild West. Wear it with stone washed denims, a casual plaid shirt and a stylish leather jacket.UpperPremium suede upper for protection, comfort and durabilityReinforced overlay for the heelCentral lacing system High on the ankle for styleMidsoleLightweight midsoleOutsoleTextured TPU outsole with flex grooves and lugsshoe careUse a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean Do not store under sunlight
